message:
feat(console): add deterministic terminal rendering primitives

Add a small, explicit-output console module for upcoming runtime debug tooling.

Key points
- Introduce `src/console.rs`:
  - Best-effort terminal capability detection (TTY, color depth, size, unicode hints)
  - Explicit `Console` that writes only to a provided `Write` target (stdout is not forced)
  - `ColorMode` (Auto/Always/Never) + `ColorSupport` (None/Basic/Extended/TrueColor)
  - Styled text primitives (`Color`, `Style`, `Text`) and a minimal `Render` trait
  - Deterministic width helpers (`char_width`, `str_width`) for layout
- Export module from `src/lib.rs`

Tests
- Add unit tests with structured logging + deterministic assertions for:
  - env-driven color detection (NO_COLOR/FORCE_COLOR/COLORTERM/TERM)
  - terminal size and unicode hints
  - render/flush behavior via an in-memory writer
